typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		ecEventGkey as long,
		yardGkey as string,
		YardID as string,
		FcyID as string,
		cheKind as string,
		CHE_Name as string,
		cheID as long,
		EcEventTime as timestamp,
		type as string,
		subType as string,
		typeDescription as string,
		fromCheIdName as string,
		ToCheIdName as string,
		unitIdName as string,
		powName as string,
		poolName as string,
		workQueue as string,
		travelDistance as integer,
		moveKind as string,
		isTwinMove as string,
		startDistance as integer,
		unitReference as string,
		tranId as string,
		locType as string,
		locId as string,
		locSlot as string,
		opsPosId as string,
		unladenLoctype as string,
		unladenLocid as string,
		unladenLocSlot as string,
		ladenLoctype as string,
		ladenLocid as string,
		ladenLocSlot as string,
		Year as integer,
		Month as integer,
		Week as integer,
		operatorName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	format: 'delta',
	fileSystem: 'mnhpi',
	folderPath: 'silver/ecevents') ~> source1
source1 select(mapColumn(
		ecEventGkey,
		YardID,
		FcyID,
		cheKind,
		CHE_Name,
		cheID,
		EcEventTime,
		type,
		subType,
		typeDescription,
		unitIdName,
		powName,
		poolName,
		workQueue,
		travelDistance,
		moveKind,
		isTwinMove,
		startDistance,
		locSlot,
		Year,
		Month,
		Week,
		operatorName
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> select
select filter(cheKind=='RTG' && typeDescription=='CMPL') ~> Filter1
Filter1 aggregate(groupBy(ecEventGkey),
	each(match(name!='ecEventGkey'), $$ = first($$))) ~> Aggregate1
Aggregate1 derive(Date = toDate(toString(EcEventTime,'yyyy-MM-dd')),
		Time = toString(EcEventTime,'HH:mm:ss'),
		ShiftStartTime = iif(
    toString(EcEventTime,'HH:mm:ss') >= toString('07:00:00') &&
    toString(EcEventTime,'HH:mm:ss') < toString('19:00:00'),
    toTimestamp(
        concat(
            concat(toString(EcEventTime,'yyyy-MM-dd'),' '),
            '07:00:00'
        )
    ),
    iif(
        toString(EcEventTime,'HH:mm:ss') >= toString('19:00:00'),
        toTimestamp(
            concat(
                concat(toString(EcEventTime,'yyyy-MM-dd'),' '),
                '19:00:00'
            )
        ),
        toTimestamp(
            concat(
                concat(toString(subDays(EcEventTime,1),'yyyy-MM-dd'),' '),
                '19:00:00'
            )
        )
    )
),
		ShiftEndTime = iif(
    toString(EcEventTime,'HH:mm:ss') >= toString('07:00:00') &&
    toString(EcEventTime,'HH:mm:ss') < toString('19:00:00'),
    toTimestamp(
        concat(
            concat(toString(EcEventTime,'yyyy-MM-dd'),' '),
            '18:59:59'
        )
    ),
    iif(
        toString(EcEventTime,'HH:mm:ss') >= toString('19:00:00'),
        toTimestamp(
            concat(
                concat(toString(addDays(EcEventTime,1),'yyyy-MM-dd'),' '),
                '06:59:59'
            )
        ),
        toTimestamp(
            concat(
                concat(toString(EcEventTime,'yyyy-MM-dd'),' '),
                '06:59:59'
            )
        )
    )
),
		Shift = iif(
    toString(EcEventTime,'HH:mm:ss') >= toString('07:00:00') &&
    toString(EcEventTime,'HH:mm:ss') < toString('19:00:00'),
    "Day",
    "Night"
),
		Bay = left(locSlot,5),
		Block = left(locSlot,3),
		Lane = right(left(locSlot, 3),1)) ~> DerivedColumn1
DerivedColumn5 window(over(cheID,
		CHE_Name),
	asc(cheID, true),
	asc(EcEventTime, true),
	CHE_ID_NXT = lead(cheID),
		EcEventTime_NXT = lead(EcEventTime),
		ShiftStartDate_NXT = lead(ShiftStartDate),
		locSlot_NXT = lead(locSlot),
		Bay_NXT = lead(Bay),
		Block_NXT = lead(Block),
		Lane_NXT = lead(Lane)) ~> Window2
DerivedColumn1 derive(ShiftStartDate = iif(
    Shift == "Night" &&
    Time < toString('07:00:00'),
    concat(
        toString(subDays(Date,1)),
        " Night"
    ),
    concat(
        toString(Date),
        " ",
        Shift
    )
)) ~> DerivedColumn5
Window2 derive(BayChangeInstance = iif(cheID==CHE_ID_NXT,
		iif(ShiftStartDate==ShiftStartDate_NXT,
			iif(Bay!=Bay_NXT,1,0),0),0),
		BlockChangeInstance = iif(cheID==CHE_ID_NXT,
		iif(ShiftStartDate==ShiftStartDate_NXT,
			iif(Block!=Block_NXT,1,0),0),0),
		LaneChangeInstance = iif(cheID==CHE_ID_NXT,
		iif(ShiftStartDate==ShiftStartDate_NXT,
			iif(Lane!=Lane_NXT,1,0),0),0)) ~> DerivedColumn6
derivedColumn7 alterRow(upsertIf(true())) ~> AlterRow1
DerivedColumn6 derive(BayChangeSeconds = iif(BayChangeInstance==1, toLong(EcEventTime_NXT - EcEventTime)/1000, toLong(0)),
		BlockChangeSeconds = iif(BlockChangeInstance==1, toLong(EcEventTime_NXT - EcEventTime)/1000, toLong(0)),
		LaneChangeSeconds = iif(LaneChangeInstance==1, toLong(EcEventTime_NXT - EcEventTime)/1000, toLong(0))) ~> derivedColumn7
AlterRow1 sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'delta',
	fileSystem: 'mnhpi',
	folderPath: 'gold/rtg_lanechange',
	mergeSchema: true,
	autoCompact: true,
	optimizedWrite: true,
	vacuum: 0,
	deletable: false,
	insertable: false,
	updateable: false,
	upsertable: true,
	keys:['ecEventGkey'],
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		ecEventGkey,
		YardID,
		FcyID,
		cheKind,
		CHE_Name,
		cheID,
		EcEventTime,
		type,
		subType,
		typeDescription,
		unitIdName,
		powName,
		poolName,
		workQueue,
		travelDistance,
		moveKind,
		isTwinMove,
		startDistance,
		locSlot,
		Year,
		Month,
		Week,
		operatorName,
		Date,
		Time,
		ShiftStartTime,
		ShiftEndTime,
		Shift,
		Bay,
		Block,
		Lane,
		ShiftDate = ShiftStartDate,
		CHE_ID_NXT,
		EcEventTime_NXT,
		ShiftDate_NXT = ShiftStartDate_NXT,
		locSlot_NXT,
		Bay_NXT,
		Block_NXT,
		Lane_NXT,
		BayChangeInstance,
		BlockChangeInstance,
		LaneChangeInstance,
		BayChangeSeconds,
		BlockChangeSeconds,
		LaneChangeSeconds
	),
	partitionBy('key',
		0,
		Year,
		Month,
		Week
	)) ~> LaneChange
